Video.summary: Married couple Jovan and Rosalyn feud over a shredded sofa, a broken TV and a dead plant.
Video.title: Johnson vs. Johnson

Video.summary: A haunted doll and accusations of witchcraft have a formerly married couple standing in front of the judges.
Video.title: Smith vs. Johnston

Video.summary: First, plaintiff claims she was struck by the defendant. Then, dance partners battle over unpaid expenses.
Video.title: To Each Their Due

Video.summary: A woman sues her ex-boyfriend for property damage and theft of a cell phone, and he says she stole his assistance check; a car accident reportedly caused by the defendant has left the plaintiff with damage to her car and lost wages.
Video.title: Checked Out

Video.summary: Corina broke up with Anthony after choking her but after finding out she's pregnant, sues for child support.
Video.title: Get It On Record

Video.summary: Jessica is suing her ex-boyfriend, stating he attacked her after accusing her of sleeping with his cousin.
Video.title: You're Just Toxic

Video.summary: First, a woman wants reimbursement for temporary loan. Then, plaintiff claims unpaid rent and damages.
Video.title: Going Under

Video.summary: First, plaintiff claims ex-wife let him unpaid bills. Then, it’s a case of hit and run.
Video.title: Hit and Ruin

Video.summary: Danette & Matthew sleep alone at night because they live in different states. The Cutlers help them decide where to call home.
Video.title: Mahabeer vs. Turner

Video.summary: A woman accuses her long-distance boyfriend of cheating.
Video.title: Matthews vs. Bryant

Video.summary: A series of red flags and an old hometown fling have Danielle questioning her boyfriend's loyalty.
Video.title: Parker vs. Riley

Video.summary: Sarah brings ex-boyfriend Richard to court for unpaid rent; he says she had an affair with the maintenance man.
Video.title: Frye vs. Hughes

Video.summary: Nelson is here to sue his sister who has battled a heroin addiction for two unpaid loans.
Video.title: Seeking Treatment for Heroin

Video.summary: Former roommates and ex-lovers, Shelby and Natalie, settle a dispute over unpaid rent money.
Video.title: Hannan vs. Davila

Video.summary: Bruce Pouncy claims his landlord, Beatrice Smith, forced him out and kept his $1,200 deposit after he suggested a new roommate. Beatrice says Bruce left the apartment a mess, removed the oven door, and didn’t pay rent.
Video.title: Rental Ruckus

Video.summary: The plaintiff wants her friend to repay her for a loan; the defendant says she used the money for her daughter's prom, but the plaintiff and her friends broke out into a fight and destroyed the venue, so she has refused to repay her.
Video.title: Prom Night

Video.summary: Emanuel has brought his former friend to court over a collections bill.
Video.title: Gone to Collections

Video.summary: Prestonie sues his mother for assault and hotel bills and claims she admitted to hating him.
Video.title: Mommy Issues

Video.summary: First, the plaintiff says friend skipped out on their lease. Then, man alleges ex stole his jewelry.
Video.title: Skipping Out

Video.summary: First, a man is suing his ex-fiancée for the return of the engagement ring. Then, a botched car sale.
Video.title: A Story of Repossession

Video.summary: First, plaintiff claims defendant stole her puppy. Then, plaintiff alleges that her ex abused her.
Video.title: Puppy Love

Video.summary: First, an alleged hit and run. Then, a plaintiff claims the defendant left house in shambles.
Video.title: In Shambles

Video.summary: First, the plaintiff claims defendant took her money. Then, a man claims he was not paid or for renovations.
Video.title: Conned Out of Love

Video.summary: Sanela and Nic found their love is getting lost in the hustle and bustle of NYC and are seeking help from the Cutlers.
Video.title: Begani vs Crespo

Video.summary: Destiny and Tavian clash over trust, paternity and financial woes, seeking answers that could make or break their future.
Video.title: Murphy vs. Scott

Video.summary: Alexus seeks vindication because hometown rumors have her boyfriend, Kristopher, questioning the paternity of their child.
Video.title: Davis-Jones vs. Martin

Video.summary: When addiction leads to a family tragedy, the Butlers turn to the judges to learn how to work through their marital issues.
Video.title: Butler vs Butler

Video.summary: Tajanea is suing her ex-boyfriend for over $2,000 after she claimed he damaged her car and apartment.
Video.title: Fumbling with the Keys and Relationship

Image.alt: Fumbling with the Keys and Relationship
Fumbling with the Keys and Relationship
Fumbling with the Keys and Relationship

Video.summary: The SED act on a felony warrant. Deputy Miller breaks up an underage party in the woods.
Video.title: Smile, You're on My Surveillance System!

Image.alt: Smile, You're on My Surveillance System!
Smile, You're on My Surveillance System!
Smile, You're on My Surveillance System!

Video.summary: A woman says her husband is failing to go the distance in their marriage.
Video.title: Covington vs. Covington

Video.summary: A polygraph test determines the fate of a rocky relationship when Bernard and Lexus both accuse the other of cheating.
Video.title: O'Neal vs Antrom

Video.summary: A DNA test, a relationship on the edge and an ultimatum that could change everything put a young couple's future on the line.
Video.title: Wright vs. Flanagan

Video.summary: When Mike’s cheating past still makes Sally feel insecure, she brings him before the Cutlers for guidance.
Video.title: Herrera vs Gallardo

Video.summary: Secret social accounts and suspicious behavior have Kashmir asking the Cutlers if this relationship can be saved.
Video.title: Thornton vs Jones

Video.summary: Shawndreca has a few demands before she marries Derrick and hopes the Cutlers can help to determine whether she will stay or walk away.
Video.title: Robinson vs. Ballard

Video.summary: A club bathroom threesome and a busted car window have ex-lovers at each other's throats.
Video.title: Aikens vs. Brown

Video.summary: Several stolen wigs and one wrecked car have a Mississippi couple standing before the judges.
Video.title: Merriweather vs. Kimmons

Video.summary: A Georgia woman suspects her longtime boyfriend of cheating because he has not yet proposed.
Video.title: Harris vs. Harris

Video.summary: A Georgia couple seek advice from the judges after struggling with nitpicking, job loss and starting a family.
Video.title: King vs. McFee

Video.summary: A messy breakup leads to a heated dispute over car damage, cheating accusations and a demand for compensation.
Video.title: Dooley vs. Sanders

Video.summary: A rekindled love and broken trust collide as Larry evaluates his future with his ex-wife and their newborn son.
Video.title: Mayes vs. Lebron

Video.summary: LaToya wants her ex-boyfriend to pay her back for the rental car after finding out he cheated on her.
Video.title: Sketchy Boyfriend / Sketchy Loan

Video.summary: Bruce says he thought he purchased a real taxidermy sail fish but says he was fooled into buying a plastic toy
Video.title: You Sold Me A Fake Fish

Image.alt: You Sold Me A Fake Fish
You Sold Me A Fake Fish
You Sold Me A Fake Fish

Video.summary: Jacqueline says the defendant, her daughter, owes her money she loaded her and won’t pay it back. When she asked to be repaid, Kathryn shoved her and she fell into her TV, cracking it, and knocking down her laptop, breaking it. Kathryn claims her mom was the one who started the shoving match between them and no TV was broken. She’s accused of mauling her mom.
Video.title: Mauling Mother

Video.summary: Steven and Luz Spitzer hired photographer Frank Calabro for their wedding, but chaos ensued when a guest’s camera sparked a fight. Frank withheld the photos, citing a contract breach.
Video.title: Wedding Wrecker

Video.summary: A man sues his ex-girlfriend for emotional distress and claims she trapped him into a relationship and gave him an S.T.D.
Video.title: You Gave Me The Ick!

Video.summary: First, a woman sues her brother for failure to repay a loan! Then, the plaintiff sues for rental repayment.
Video.title: Pay Up or Get Out

Video.summary: Ex-roommates call each other a deadbeat and a con artist; a former tenant wants to be compensated for repairs he made to a flooded, moldy basement, and his security deposit.
Video.title: Con-venient Deadbeat

Video.summary: First, woman sues for the fraudulent iPhone sale. Then, plaintiff is suing the defendant for a down payment!
Video.title: i-Fraud

Video.summary: First, a sister sues her brother for $5000. Then, a woman claims a man stole her puppy.
Video.title: Oh, Brother

Video.summary: First, a daughter sues her mother for unpaid bills and lost wages. Then, plaintiff sues for property damage.
Video.title: In Need of Repair
